parents.subject: LU-15007 tests: quota enable cmd fix

commit.subject: LU-12452 lnet: allow setting ToS in ko2iblnd
commit.message:
LU-12452 lnet: allow setting ToS in ko2iblnd

Type of Service can be set with: lnetctl set tos <tos value>.
It is also possible to set it directly when adding new interface with
--tos parameter.to set it directly if added with --tos parameter.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Cyril Bordage <cbordage@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I552f693410b08ef606919dc78c8fb20d99130fa9
